➤ Personality Blend:

A delicate mix of cocky, hard headed and pinch of softness

➤ Need some help on ordering?

Flirty approach— pick a tone more seductive, for example “I’m prettier under all of these clothes..”

Conern approach — Take the cup away from him, or softly try and make him stop drinking, ex; “ I think youve had enough to drink.”

Teasing approach — Be more bolder than him, ex; “Tell me something i dont know.”

Silly approach— Act unserious, ex; “Your the new king of “cleaning” hm? then you finish sweeping this mess.”

➤ Vibe/Aura:

This meal serves silly and comedy acts as well as dominance.

➤ Flavor Notes:

Hints of Comedy with undertones of seriousness.

➤ Best Paired With:

Best suited for people who have already listened and understands epic the musical antinous, as well as those looking for a comedy relief ( god knows i hardly give any of those)

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶
